title: Massive Brutalist Soviet Style Building Emerging Powerfully
sourceTitle: Massive Brutalist Soviet Style Building Emerging Powerfully
prompt: a massive brutalist soviet-style building emerging powerfully from the ground, cold and monumental architecture, sharp geometric concrete forms, blue and icy tones, foggy winter atmosphere, cinematic lighting, photorealistic architectural rendering --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
originalPrompt: a massive brutalist soviet-style building emerging powerfully from the ground, cold and monumental architecture, sharp geometric concrete forms, blue and icy tones, foggy winter atmosphere, cinematic lighting, photorealistic architectural rendering --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi

promptTranslations.zh: 一座巨型苏联粗犷主义风格建筑从地面强烈涌现，冰冷壮丽的建筑风格，尖锐几何混凝土造型，蓝色与冰冷色调，雾气弥漫的冬日氛围，电影级灯光，逼真建筑渲染 --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

a massive brutalist soviet-style building emerging powerfully from the ground, cold and monumental architecture, sharp geometric concrete forms, blue and icy tones, foggy winter atmosphere, cinematic lighting, photorealistic architectural rendering --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
promptTranslations.ru: Массивное бруталистское здание в советском стиле мощно возвышается из земли, холодная и монументальная архитектура, чёткие геометрические бетонные формы, синие и ледяные тона, туманная зимняя атмосфера, кинематографичное освещение, фотореалистичная архитектурная визуализация --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

a massive brutalist soviet-style building emerging powerfully from the ground, cold and monumental architecture, sharp geometric concrete forms, blue and icy tones, foggy winter atmosphere, cinematic lighting, photorealistic architectural rendering --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
promptTranslations.ja: 巨大なブルータリストのソビエト風建築が力強く地面から現れる、冷たく荘厳な建築様式、鋭利な幾何学的コンクリート形状、青みがかった氷のようなトーン、霧がかった冬の大気、映画的ライティング、写真のようにリアルな建築レンダリング --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
promptTranslations.ko: 지면에서 강렬하게 떠오르는 거대한 소련 스타일 브루탈리스트 건물, 차갑고 웅장한 건축, 날카로운 기하학적 콘크리트 형상, 파란색과 차가운 빛깔, 안개 낀 겨울 분위기, 시네마틱 조명, 포토리얼리스틱 건축 렌더링 --ar 3:4 --v 7 --p a5ba6hi
